spanish: Si estás acercándote al mundo de Linux, seguramente ya hayas visto el término release candidate.
english: If you're approaching the world of Linux, you've probably already seen the term release candidate.
explanation: Present subjunctive 'hayas visto' after 'seguramente' - expresses probability/doubt in present perfect tense

spanish: No lo pongas en producción hasta que no se revise bien.
english: Don't put it into production until it has been thoroughly reviewed.
context: Es como si dijéramos que el edificio está construido, pero todavía se están haciendo las últimas inspecciones.
explanation: Imperfect subjunctive 'dijéramos' after 'como si' - hypothetical comparison in the present

spanish: Cuando esa ventana se cierra, Linus Torvalds lanza la primera release candidate.
english: When that window closes, Linus Torvalds launches the first release candidate.
explanation: Present indicative with 'cuando' referring to habitual action - not subjunctive because it's a definite, regular occurrence
